mapper.select: SELECT id, task_name AS taskName, task_code AS taskCode, source_url AS sourceUrl, source_type AS sourceType, crawl_rule AS crawlRule, priority, cron_expression AS cronExpression, max_retry AS maxRetry, retry_delay AS retryDelay, timeout_seconds AS timeoutSeconds, status, last_run_time AS lastRunTime, next_run_time AS nextRunTime, total_runs AS totalRuns, success_runs AS successRuns, fail_runs AS failRuns, description, enabled, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM crawl_tasks WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crawl_tasks WHERE task_code = #{taskCode}

SELECT id, task_name AS taskName, task_code AS taskCode, source_url AS sourceUrl, source_type AS sourceType, crawl_rule AS crawlRule, priority, cron_expression AS cronExpression, max_retry AS maxRetry, retry_delay AS retryDelay, timeout_seconds AS timeoutSeconds, status, last_run_time AS lastRunTime, next_run_time AS nextRunTime, total_runs AS totalRuns, success_runs AS successRuns, fail_runs AS failRuns, description, enabled FROM crawl_tasks WHERE enabled = 1 AND cron_expression IS NOT NULL AND cron_expression != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crawl_tasks (task_name, task_code, source_url, source_type, crawl_rule, priority, cron_expression, max_retry, retry_delay, timeout_seconds, description, enabled, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{taskCode}, #{sourceUrl}, #{sourceType}, #{crawlRule}, #{priority}, #{cronExpression}, #{maxRetry}, #{retryDelay}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{description}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE crawl_tasks SET task_name = #{taskName}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, source_type = #{sourceType}, crawl_rule = #{crawlRule}, priority = #{priority}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, max_retry = #{maxRetry}, retry_delay = #{retryDelay}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crawl_tasks SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE crawl_tasks SET status = #{status}, last_run_time = #{lastRunTime}, next_run_time = #{nextRunTime}, total_runs = total_runs + 1, success_runs = success_runs + 1, fail_runs = fail_runs + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
